    • Kfz-Daten – Österreich (Neuzulassungen & Bestand)

Polygons for Austria's 9 State Capitals

at_capitals_polys.Rd

Spatial polygon data for Austria’s 9 Landeshauptstädte (state capitals), filtered from the official Statistik Austria municipal boundaries shapefile.

Format

An sf object with 9 rows and X columns (see below).

Source

Statistik Austria: https://data.statistik.gv.at/data/OGDEXT_GEM_1_STATISTIK_AUSTRIA_20250101.zip

Details

The data was filtered using the official municipality codes (GKZ) for the following capitals: Wien, St. Pölten, Eisenstadt, Linz, Graz, Klagenfurt am Wörthersee, Salzburg, Innsbruck, Bregenz.

See also

The full shapefile was obtained from Statistik Austria's open data portal.

Examples

plot(at_capitals_polys["geometry"])
#> Error in x[i]: Can't subset columns that don't exist.
#> ✖ Column `geometry` doesn't exist.
